approved_spec: Min 12 months shelf life; resealable zipper bag; allergen declared
notes: Benchmark based on last contracted rate April 2024. Prices above EUR 3.15 require category manager sign-off.
Current contract expires February 2025. Dual sourcing preferred from Q1 2025.

approved_spec: Organic certified preferred; foil pouch required; minimum 10 months shelf life
notes: Seasonal volatility expected. Prices above EUR 5.60 flagged for review. Harvest-dependent SKU - confirm supply continuity before contract.
Own-brand. Not relevant for branded supplier quotes.

approved_spec: Standard: Net 30. Net 45 accepted with VP Procurement approval only.
notes: All Ambient Food category purchase orders.

approved_spec: EXW non-preferred. ZavaShop standard is DDP or DAP to Netherlands Distribution Centre. Exceptions require Supply Chain Director approval.
notes: Non-compliance must be escalated before contract signature.

approved_spec: Automatic renewal clauses must include a fixed notice period of at least 60 days and capped price escalation of maximum 3% per cycle. Open-ended price escalation at supplier discretion is not acceptable per procurement policy CP-14.
notes: CP-14 violation flagged in Nordic Provisions renewal negotiations Q2 2022 and Q4 2023.

approved_spec: Any quoted price more than 5% above ZavaShop benchmark triggers an automatic price challenge. Buyer must request written justification from supplier before proceeding.
notes: Applies to all Ambient Food SKUs.

approved_spec: New suppliers require a quality audit before first order exceeds 5000 units.
Dual sourcing required for any SKU with annual spend above EUR 100000 or classified as a category A ingredient.
notes: Annual spend threshold applies per SKU not per supplier.

approved_spec: Price validity windows shorter than 90 days are not acceptable for contract negotiations.
notes: Applies to all Ambient Food supplier quotations.
